calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-31-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2008 Continued To Jan-16-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-30-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Lawrence R. Sussman, Esq. appeared with Michael Kwong, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Miu Wan (Judy) Yeung.
Amended default was entered on September 19, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, October 30, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Michael Kwong, and against the Defaulted Defendant Miu Wan (Judy) Yeung as follows:

Damages/Principal - $100,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $10,631.20.
Costs - $1,155.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $111,786.20.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
